queries.question: Empirical analysis of loan duration in months as a determinant of reduced credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Present employment duration: less than 1 year.
queries.question: Statistical impact of present employment duration of less than 1 year on the likelihood of credit default.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical evidence on the correlation between checking account status indicating no checking account and higher credit default probability.
